race.description: RMBL Investments Rising Stars Race BM56 Hcp
race.comment: Plenty of different angles here but hard to go past the talented UNDISPUTABLE (2). Returned from a break with a close-up fourth at Pakenham in first run for seven months. Beaten just a length and will be far fitter. Looks well placed this line-up and can quickly return to winning form. DIAMOND INDARUF (8) on the other hand can't seem to buy a win and is long overdue. Freshened since finishing runner-up this grade latest and rates a leading player on best. AFFIRMATIVE LAD (4) ran on hard to score here last time and looks tough to stop again. ROCK GLORY (12) led throughout to score at the latest and will give a sight again.
